title: Your Arrival Is a Signal
theme: the level reacts to where you are
learningGoal: anticipate how entering a zone or pressing a plate reshapes the route before spending the jump
mentalModel: triggers turn your position into an input the level responds to
misconceptions: stepping onto a plate only ever helps you
subversion: the plate that opens the exit is the same press that arms the threat behind the jump
optimizationFocus: sequencing the trigger so the exit is open exactly for the frame the jump needs it
finalExam: open the exit and clear the gap before your own trigger reverses the state

levelSlots.intentSentence: Spend the one jump on the decisive observation read because the bare corridor offers no help and a habitual early commitment falls into the pit.
